Levels.learning: Trials where A and B pairmates are shown together
Levels.prelearning: Prelearning snapshot: each A and B item is shown once in a random order
Levels.restudy: B is shown alone not following A
Levels.violation: A is shown followed by a face instead of the B pairmate

Levels.nonviolation: A followed by B is never violated
Levels.violation: A followed by B is violated

pairmate.Description: A or B item within a pairmate

Levels.X: Face shown during a pairmate's first violation
Levels.Y: Face shown during a pairmate's second violation

response_accuracy.Description: A participant's response is scored for accuracy. If no response was made, the value is NaN

response_time.Description: Reaction time. Time in seconds for participant to make a response since stimulus onset

repetition.Description: This trial is the nth time this image was shown

pairID.Description: Pairmate number assigned to this A-B pairing for this participant
